comments.author: @DiscoverGlobePlacesTop10_NL158
comments.text: Zero crime,no locked doors... Maybe small communities create better people than modern cities .

replies.author: @Outland_US
replies.text: Thanks for the insight! Small communities definitely offer unmatched security. Does this level of safety make small towns the best choice for your retirement planning, or do modern cities still win because of better healthcare and amenities?

comments.author: @PaksPakinoo
comments.text: I want to be the first black person  to go the

replies.author: @Outland_US
replies.text: That would be making history! Reaching Tristan is the ultimate adventure. While aiming for that, have you ever considered such a remote place for your retirement planning? Where are you starting this epic journey from?

comments.author: @PaksPakinoo
comments.text: Why is the a Namibian flag

replies.author: @Outland_US
replies.text: Good catch, but that's actually the flag of Tristan da Cunha! They do share some similar vibes though. If you could visit any remote country right now, which flag would you follow? Let me know!
